🎯 Prompt Review

Load a project to review prompts.
🎵 SOUNDSCAPE = Musical/Tonal Direction Scene-level emotional arc for music composition — NOT ambient SFX. Must stay consistent across all shots in the scene.

Director Tools

PHASE 2

🎬 Angle Reframe

AI-powered shot reframing with intelligent composition. Adjust framing, angle, and focal point via natural language.

🎥 Kling Image-to-Video

Convert still frames to cinematic motion with Kling's advanced I2V. Control camera movement and subject animation.

🌀 Hybrid Motion

Blend multiple motion styles for complex shots. Combine dolly, pan, zoom with character animation paths.

🎭 Blocking Bridge

Character blocking and positioning tool. Map actor positions across shot transitions for continuity.

🔄 Variant Selector

Compare and select from multiple generated variants. A/B test different takes for best performance.

🔍 DINOv2 + CLIP Verify

Face consistency verification using DINOv2 embeddings and CLIP prompt adherence scoring. Auto-flag issues.

⬆️ Promote to Kling

Upgrade LTX renders to higher-quality Kling output for hero shots. Selective quality boost.

📊 Coverage Analysis

Analyze scene coverage: shot sizes, angles, character screen time. Auto-inject missing coverage.
